pipeline_metadata.query_template:

- Termination rights and conditions
- Breach of contract
- Governing law and jurisdiction
- Liability and limitations
- Indemnification obligations
- Force majeure
- Dispute resolution
- Intellectual property rights
- Confidentiality and non-disclosure

raw_context:
GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION

Each party agrees to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party from and against any and 
all claims, damages, losses, and expenses arising from:
(a) Breach of any representation, warranty, or obligation under this Agreement
(b) Negligence or willful misconduct
(c) Violation of applicable laws or regulations

If negotiations fail, disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the 
rules of the American Arbitration Association.

TERMINATION

Either party may terminate this Agreement immediately if the other party:
(a) Materially breaches any term of this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within 15 days
(b) Becomes insolvent, bankrupt, or subject to bankruptcy proceedings
(c) Ceases business operations
